mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_draft (template_id, field_values, user_id, device_id, tenant_id, saved_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{fieldValues}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{tenantId}, #{savedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, field_values, user_id, device_id, tenant_id, saved_at FROM form_draft WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT id, template_id, field_values, user_id, device_id, tenant_id, saved_at FROM form_draft WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY saved_at DESC
SELECT id, template_id, field_values, user_id, device_id, tenant_id, saved_at FROM form_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY saved_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM form_draft WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
DELETE FROM form_draft WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND template_id = #{templateId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
